provenance: hand-labeled by JT for issue #7's eval suite

golden_review.summary: Implements hybrid retrieval via BM25 + pgvector with reciprocal rank fusion. RRF math is correct and the index DDL is sensible; one concern about chunk-id collision handling on re-index and a nit about test coverage of the per-method ranks payload.

findings.message: Re-index path doesn't clear stale rows before inserting new vectors; chunk-id collisions silently overwrite without a warning.
RetrievalResult.ranks dict surfaces per-method ranks but no test asserts on its keys; a downstream consumer that misspells 'lexical' would silently get None.
RRF k=60 default matches Cormack et al. SIGIR 2009 and is documented in the docstring with the citation. Good provenance hygiene.
